what_it_does: This file is a ledger/metadata record for a design-source image asset named p-24 under the capital-raise path; it stores identity, blob reference, MIME type, provenance, and authorship, and labels the image as SOURCE design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id capital-raise/p-24 and image://design-source/capital-raise/p-24 address
channel is design-source and path is capital-raise/p-24
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-24.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image/jpeg entry
Explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
Contains a blob reference but no links to other records
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Records provenance via source, author_session, and created fields
Names the file with image__{channel}_{path} pattern
concerns: Image dimensions are reported as 0, which is unusual for a JPEG
No description or alt text of the image content
No links to related design or code records
Blob integrity/availability cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A sparse provenance stub for a capital-raise design image that identifies the asset but omits visual content details.
questions: What visual content does capital-raise/p-24.jpg contain?
Why are the width and height values 0?
Is the referenced blob actually available and valid?

purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to serve as SOURCE design ground-truth metadata for an image; actual content is a minimal metadata stub with zero dimensions and no visual description, so it establishes identity and provenance but not image content.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register an authoritative, traceable design-source image asset for a capital-raise document or page, capturing identity, blob location, authorship, and timestamp.
contribution: Provides a stable identity, address, and blob pointer for image p-24 plus provenance metadata that a fused system can use to locate, attribute, and link the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A design-source ledger entry for image capital-raise/p-24.jpg with a blob reference, zero dimensions, and provenance metadata.
intention_for_embedding: To register and ground-truth a capital-raise design image asset in the channel-memory ledger.
